cases.case: concurrent requests for the same revision
cases.expected: one canonical claim/effect; loser replays or receives conflict without duplicate dispatch

cases.case: stale approval or approval for another revision
cases.expected: fail closed before effect

cases.case: budget reservation conflict
cases.expected: atomic deny; conserved reserved/committed/released totals

cases.case: rate-token exhaustion across workers
cases.expected: shared 429 with durable retry-after; no per-worker bypass

cases.case: provider timeout before effect
cases.expected: failed/released only when dispatch is proven absent; otherwise ambiguous

cases.case: provider acceptance whose response is lost
cases.expected: ambiguous; reconcile before retry

cases.case: crash after effect but before receipt
cases.expected: repair observes/reconciles effect; no blind redispatch

cases.case: crash after receipt but before proof projection
cases.expected: projection repair converges from accepted receipt

cases.case: partial multi-step success followed by retry
cases.expected: resume from accepted step; no duplication, leaked reservation, false failure, or lost proof

cases.case: duplicate, stale, or reordered replay
cases.expected: canonical prior terminal state returned; stale authority denied

cases.case: refund, reversal, or compensating action
cases.expected: linked adjustment preserves history and conservation

cases.case: restart and owner proof refinding
cases.expected: same revision/effect/receipt/accounting/proof lineage is refindable
